EHang Holdings Ltd, a leader in advanced air mobility technology, specializes in developing and manufacturing pilotless electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) aircraft for various applications, including urban and intercity transport, logistics, and emergency services.

In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, EHang Holdings Ltd announced a total revenue of RMB92.5 million, a decrease from the previous year’s third quarter. Despite this, the company maintained its full-year revenue guidance of RMB500 million, highlighting strategic advancements such as the unveiling of the VT35 model and expansion efforts in global markets.

Key financial metrics revealed a net loss of RMB82.1 million, with sales and deliveries of 42 eVTOL units, a decline from previous quarters. The company also reported a gross margin of 60.8%. Strategically, EHang launched the VT35 for intercity mobility and initiated the Thailand AAM Sandbox Initiative, aiming to enhance its global footprint in countries like Qatar, Japan, Kazakhstan, and Rwanda.

Looking ahead, EHang remains optimistic about its growth trajectory, supported by its diversified product portfolio and readiness for commercial operations both domestically and internationally. The company’s management expressed confidence in achieving long-term, high-quality growth by leveraging its solid track record and expanding its global presence.

data.description:

CD Projekt SA, a prominent player in the video game industry known for its popular titles such as The Witcher and Cyberpunk 2077, has released its financial results for the third quarter of 2025, showcasing significant growth in its financial performance. The company, headquartered in Poland, operates primarily in the gaming sector, developing and publishing video games that have garnered a global fanbase.

In the latest earnings report, CD Projekt SA highlighted a substantial increase in net sales and profits compared to the same period last year. The company’s net sales reached PLN 792,112 thousand, a notable rise from PLN 652,140 thousand in the previous year. This growth was largely driven by the continued success of Cyberpunk 2077 and its expansion, Phantom Liberty, as well as the enduring popularity of The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt.

Key financial metrics indicate a strong performance, with the operating profit soaring to PLN 362,675 thousand, up from PLN 220,874 thousand in the previous year. The net profit attributable to the owners of CD Projekt SA also saw a significant increase, reaching PLN 348,430 thousand. The company’s strategic focus on expanding its game offerings and enhancing its digital distribution platform, GOG.COM, has contributed to this robust financial performance.

Looking ahead, CD Projekt SA remains optimistic about its future prospects. The company continues to invest in the development of new games, including The Witcher 4 and Cyberpunk 2, and is expanding its infrastructure with new office facilities to support its growing operations. With a strong financial foundation and a pipeline of exciting projects, CD Projekt SA is well-positioned to maintain its momentum in the competitive gaming industry.

data.description:
Trigano SA ( (TGNOF) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Trigano SA presented to its investors.

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.

Trigano SA is a leading European manufacturer of leisure vehicles and equipment, specializing in motorhomes, caravans, and related accessories. The company operates in the leisure and outdoor industry, known for its extensive range of products catering to outdoor enthusiasts.

In its latest earnings report for the fiscal year 2024/2025, Trigano reported a significant improvement in operating cash flow, reaching €563.9 million, despite a challenging year marked by reduced production of motorhomes and caravans. The company achieved a recurring operating income of €335.9 million, representing 9.2% of sales.

Trigano’s financial performance was impacted by a 6.8% decline in sales, totaling €3,660.2 million. The leisure vehicles segment, which includes motorhomes and caravans, saw a 6.9% decrease in sales, while the leisure equipment segment experienced a 4.1% decline. Despite these challenges, the company managed to strengthen its financial position, with total equity rising to €2,081.3 million and a net cash position of €279.2 million.

Looking ahead, Trigano remains optimistic about the growing interest in outdoor leisure activities across Europe. The company plans to gradually increase production in the first half of 2026 to align with market demand and aims to capitalize on the positive momentum in the mobile home market. Trigano also intends to explore strategic growth opportunities to enhance its market position.

Overall, Trigano’s management is focused on adapting to market conditions and consumer preferences, with a strategy to offer attractive and accessible products to maintain its growth trajectory.

data.title: Ingles Markets Reports Resilient 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Ingles Markets Inc ( (IMKTA) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Ingles Markets Inc presented to its investors.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Ingles Markets, Incorporated, a leading grocery retailer operating in six southeastern states, is headquartered in Asheville, North Carolina, and manages 197 supermarkets alongside neighborhood shopping centers and a fluid dairy facility.

Ingles Markets reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025, highlighting a year of strategic improvements and resilience despite challenges. The company emphasized its commitment to enhancing customer experience and acknowledged the hard work of its associates throughout the year.

For the fourth quarter of 2025, Ingles Markets achieved net sales of $1.37 billion, a slight decrease from the previous year’s $1.40 billion. However, the company saw a significant improvement in gross profit, which rose to $334.7 million, or 24.5% of sales, compared to 21.4% in the prior year. Notably, the company turned around its net income to $25.7 million from a net loss of $1.5 million in the same quarter of 2024, which had been impacted by hurricane-related impairments.

On an annual basis, Ingles Markets reported net sales of $5.33 billion for fiscal year 2025, down from $5.64 billion in 2024. Despite the decrease in sales, the company maintained a stable gross profit margin of 23.9%. The fiscal year net income was $83.6 million, a decline from $105.5 million in 2024. The company also reduced its capital expenditures significantly from $210.9 million in 2024 to $114.5 million in 2025, indicating a more conservative investment approach.

Looking ahead, Ingles Markets remains optimistic about its financial resources and operational strategies. The company believes it has sufficient financial resources to meet its capital expenditures, debt service, and working capital requirements, positioning it well for future growth and stability.

data.title: Pharvaris Reports Q3 2025 Financial Results and Updates
data.description:
Pharvaris N.V. ( (PHVS) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Pharvaris N.V. presented to its investors.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Pharvaris N.V. is a late-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel, oral bradykinin B2 receptor antagonists to address unmet needs in bradykinin-mediated diseases such as hereditary angioedema (HAE) and acquired angioedema due to C1 inhibitor deficiency (AAE-C1INH).

In its third quarter 2025 financial results, Pharvaris highlighted advancements in its clinical development programs, including the anticipated release of topline data from its pivotal Phase 3 RAPIDe-3 study for the on-demand treatment of HAE attacks by the end of 2025. The company also reported progress in the CHAPTER-3 study for prophylactic treatment, and the initiation of the CREAATE study for both prophylactic and on-demand treatment of AAE-C1INH attacks.

Key financial metrics from the third quarter reveal a strong liquidity position with cash and cash equivalents totaling €329 million as of September 30, 2025. Research and development expenses increased to €29.8 million, reflecting ongoing investment in clinical trials, while general and administrative expenses decreased to €9.8 million. The company reported a reduced quarterly loss of €37.1 million, compared to €41.7 million in the same period last year.

Pharvaris’ strategic focus remains on advancing its pipeline, with significant milestones expected in the coming quarters. The company is well-funded, with a cash runway extending into the first half of 2027, supporting its ongoing and future clinical trials.

Looking ahead, Pharvaris is poised to continue its development efforts, with upcoming data readouts from key studies potentially reinforcing its position in the treatment of bradykinin-mediated diseases. The management remains committed to delivering innovative therapies that combine efficacy with the convenience of oral administration.

Liberty Gold Corp., a company focused on developing open pit oxide deposits in the Great Basin of the United States, has released its third-quarter financial and operational results for 2025. The company is advancing the Black Pine Project in Idaho, a significant gold-producing region.

In the latest quarter, Liberty Gold reported several strategic developments, including the closure of a subscription agreement with Centerra Gold Inc., which acquired a 9.9% stake in the company. Additionally, the company received a staged payment for the sale of its interest in the TV Tower project and made key appointments to its corporate and project development teams.

Financially, Liberty Gold reported a loss of $6.25 million for the quarter, slightly higher than the previous year’s $5.6 million loss. However, the company’s cash and short-term investments increased significantly to $32.46 million from $6.97 million at the end of 2024, indicating improved liquidity. The Black Pine project continues to show promising metallurgical results, with consistent gold extractions and potential for resource expansion.

The Black Pine project has seen positive developments, with successful metallurgical testing and drilling results indicating the potential for economic reprocessing and resource expansion. The Rangefront Zone, in particular, has shown significant potential for future mining operations, with new exploration opportunities emerging.

Looking ahead, Liberty Gold remains focused on advancing its projects in the Great Basin, with continued exploration and development activities aimed at unlocking further value. The company’s management is optimistic about the potential for growth and profitability in the coming quarters.

data.title: Unity Software’s CAO Makes a Major Stock Sale!
data.description:
New insider activity at Unity Software ( (U) ) has taken place on November 26, 2025.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.

In a notable transaction, CAO Mark Barrysmith has sold 43,283 shares of Unity Software stock, amounting to a significant $1,791,938.

Recent Updates on U stock

Unity Software has seen significant developments recently, particularly with its strategic partnership with Epic Games, which is expected to enhance its position in the direct payments sector. This collaboration is anticipated to drive substantial EBITDA growth as adoption increases, according to Morgan Stanley. The partnership allows Unity games to be published in Fortnite, potentially reaching over 500 million registered accounts, and is seen as a move to deepen Unity’s competitive moat. Additionally, Unity’s support for Unreal Engine in its commerce platform is expected to provide developers with more options for managing digital operations. These strategic moves have led to positive analyst sentiment, with upgrades and increased price targets reflecting the anticipated financial benefits and strategic positioning. However, some analysts note that while Unity’s position strengthens, it also highlights the dominance of competitors like Roblox in user-generated content gaming. The market has reacted with bullish option activity, indicating positive investor sentiment.

Spark’s Take on U Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, U is a Neutral.

Unity Software’s overall score reflects strong technical momentum and positive earnings call highlights, particularly in the Grow and Create segments. However, ongoing profitability challenges and valuation concerns weigh on the score. The company’s strategic expansions and product advancements provide a solid foundation for future growth, but regional revenue concentration remains a potential risk.

data.title: Top Executive Cashes In on TransMedics Stock
data.description:
New insider activity at TransMedics Group ( (TMDX) ) has taken place on November 26, 2025.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Anil P. Ranganath, the Senior Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary of TransMedics Group, recently sold 3,000 shares of the company’s stock. This transaction was valued at $435,660.

Recent Updates on TMDX stock

TransMedics Group’s stock saw a notable increase of 10.4% to $129.19, driven by strong Q3 2025 financial results and strategic initiatives. The company reported a 32.2% year-over-year revenue growth, reaching approximately $144 million, with significant contributions from its U.S. transplant revenue. Despite a seasonal slowdown and sequential revenue decline, the company improved its operating margins and strengthened its cash position. Analysts adjusted their price targets based on these developments: Piper Sandler lowered its target due to revenue landing slightly below consensus, despite a strong bottom-line performance and raised full-year guidance, while Canaccord raised its target, viewing the current stock price as a buying opportunity given the company’s robust performance and strategic expansion plans. Overall, the positive outlook and strategic initiatives, including international expansion and collaborations, suggest a promising trajectory for TransMedics.

Spark’s Take on TMDX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TMDX is a Outperform.

TransMedics Group’s strong financial performance and positive technical indicators are the most significant factors driving the stock score. The company’s robust revenue growth, improved profitability, and cash flow generation underscore its financial health. Technical analysis shows bullish momentum, though caution is advised due to potential overbought conditions. Valuation remains a concern with a high P/E ratio, and the earnings call provided a balanced outlook with more positive highlights than challenges.
